title: dactylorhiza cordigera var. graeca
intro: Dactylorhiza cordigera var. graeca, also known as the Balkan marsh orchid, is a rare and protected species of orchid native to the Balkan Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds, which are derived from its tubers. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza cordigera var. graeca include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in wound healing. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use through drying and grinding into a powder, which can be used as a dietary supplement or added to teas and infusions.
